raw_text:
EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Total expenditure for November 2024 came in at $62,100 against a budget of $33,000, a full-period overage of $29,100 (+88.2%). The variance is almost entirely driven by a single unbudgeted legal event: a $27,500 invoice from Whitmore & Associates for IP dispute advisory work related to a patent defence matter against Vantec Corp., posted to Professional Fees. A secondary, smaller overage of $1,200 in Legal & Compliance reflects planned legal fees for two VP-level employment agreements tied to approved headcount additions. Both items carry CFO approval. Forward exposure remains on the IP matter, with the General Counsel estimating a further $8–18K likely to land in Q1 2025; no recovery or insurance offset has been identified to date. Remaining line items are immaterial.

LINE COMMENTARY

Professional Fees | +$27,500 (+183.3%) | Budget: $15,000 | Actual: $42,500
The $27,500 overage reflects the second billing from Whitmore & Associates (Matter WA-2024-IP-441) for IP dispute advisory work in defence of a patent infringement claim brought by Vantec Corp. The firm was engaged in August 2024; the first invoice of $12,000 was absorbed within budget in September/October. This November invoice, covering work performed October–November in preparation for USPTO proceedings, was CFO-approved on 10 November and posted in full this period. The Slack thread confirms this was an anticipated charge. Total matter spend to date is approximately $39.5K against a General Counsel estimate of $45–55K over six months, implying a remaining exposure of approximately $8–18K expected in Q1 2025. No recovery, insurance, or indemnity offset has been identified. Finance may wish to confirm whether further budget provision is required for the Q1 tail spend.
Sources
- Gmail - 2024-11-17T18:15:00Z - gmail-professional_fees-broad - Invoice from Whitmore & Associates — IP dispute advisory, Matter WA-2024-IP-441. Work performed October–November in preparation for USPTO proceedings. Fee: $27,500. CFO approved 10 November.
- Slack - 2024-11-17T12:15:00Z - slack-professional_fees-broad - Whitmore invoice hit today, $27.5K for IP defence work. This is the large one we've been expecting. CFO approved, posted to Professional Fees. Total matter spend so far: $39.5K of ~$50K estimate.
- Gmail - 2024-11-17T18:45:00Z - gmail-professional_fees-narrow - Context from GC — Whitmore engaged in August to defend against patent claim from Vantec Corp. Expected total matter cost $45–55K over 6 months. November invoice is second billing; first $12K was absorbed within budget in September/October. Remaining $8–18K expected in Q1 2025.

Legal & Compliance | +$1,200 (+24.0%) | Budget: $5,000 | Actual: $6,200
The $1,200 overage is fully attributable to a flat-fee invoice from Heron Legal for the drafting of employment agreements for two newly hired VPs (VP Engineering and VP Sales), both accepted in November. The engagement is described as a standard process on a board-approved basis, and the invoice was CFO-approved. The overage reflects planned incremental spend tied to approved headcount and is not indicative of uncontrolled cost.
Sources
- Gmail - 2024-11-18T18:15:00Z - gmail-legal_&_compliance-broad - Invoice from Heron Legal — employment agreements for two new VP hires (VP Engineering and VP Sales). $1,200 flat fee per board-approved engagement. CFO approved.
- Slack - 2024-11-18T12:15:00Z - slack-legal_&_compliance-broad - VP Engineering and VP Sales offers accepted. Employment agreements went to Heron Legal for review this month — standard process. $1,200 total.

INSIGNIFICANT VARIANCES
The following lines were reviewed and assessed as immaterial. No detailed commentary is provided.
- **Audit & Accounting** — +$200 (+2.5%): Minor overage within normal fluctuation range.
- **Software Subscriptions** — +$100 (+3.3%): Minor overage within normal fluctuation range.
- **Office & Admin** — +$100 (+5.0%): Minor overage within normal fluctuation range.
